$comment: User personas at Pylon's paying customers. 30 individuals across 7 accounts. Used as fixtures in support tickets, in-app activity logs, sales account history, and AI-agent reasoning about customer-side roles. Names are fictional.

users.name: Theo Brennan
users.notes: Filed the PYL-224 fire-rate request. Approves all Pylon contract renewals.

users.name: Annika Sjöblom
users.notes: Wrote 6 of Stratosphere's 9 custom Beacon rules.

users.name: Marcos Vidal
users.notes: Reviews most Beacon comments on their robotics codebase. Vocal about C++ rule coverage gaps.

users.name: Priya Iyer
users.notes: Tower power user — opens it daily. Reviewed PYL-102 team-comparison feature in Q1 customer interviews.

users.name: Kenji Nakata
users.notes: Not a primary Pylon user but consumes Tower release-quality metrics for sprint reviews.

users.name: Bea Okafor
users.notes: Founded Lumen with CEO. Drove the Pylon adoption decision (came from Stripe; saw Pylon evaluated there). Reported PYL-300.

users.name: Ramon Velasco
users.notes: Authored 11 of Lumen's 23 custom rules — most are HIPAA-aware data-handling patterns.

users.name: Naseem Khan
users.notes: Champion for Java coverage. Has filed two CS tickets about Java timing.

users.name: Jolene Carter
users.notes: Frequently dismisses Beacon findings. Bridget keeps an eye on her dismissal patterns to spot rule-tuning candidates.

users.name: Priya Subramanian
users.notes: Same first+last name as Pylon's CTO — coincidence; Pylon-side staff knows. Gentle Slack joke during an early support call.

users.name: Adetokunbo Ojo
users.notes: Owns Lumen's security posture; main interlocutor for Pylon's SOC 2 Type II evidence portal preparation.

users.name: Eamon Walsh
users.notes: Predictable, methodical, low-noise customer. Renewal handled on autopilot.

users.name: Aiya Tarasov
users.notes: Wrote 9 of Kaltsworth's 14 custom rules. Strong opinions on rule documentation; gave us specific feedback on the Beacon docs UX.

users.name: Joaquín Reséndez
users.notes: Filed PYL-225 for status-check name customization.

users.name: Lan Vu
users.notes: Tower customer; runs weekly review-quality syncs with her team using Pylon's metrics.

users.name: Sigrún Thorvaldsdottir
users.notes: Pilot champion for GitLab Cloud integration. Drove pilot through her org. Approved sign-off on the pilot in April.

users.name: Ekene Amadi
users.notes: Found and reproed PYL-305 (duplicate MR comments) during pilot. Sent Pylon a clear repro repo within 24h of first noticing.

users.name: Maya Johanson
users.notes: Newer hire; learning Beacon by reading dismissal reasons on existing PRs.

users.name: Hugo Restrepo
users.notes: Pushing internally for Enterprise upgrade. Wants SAML SSO + audit logs.

users.name: Quinn Strickland
users.notes: Reported PYL-302. Patient, thoughtful, gives the cleanest bug repros of any customer.

users.name: Inara Vasquez
users.notes: Heavy C# user. Tracks Pylon's C# coverage roadmap closely.

users.name: Daichi Mori
users.notes: Reviews most of Arcola's tooling PRs. Tower casual user.

users.name: Harriet Olajide
users.notes: Drove Northwall's adoption. Marketplace power user; her team published the first 5 customer rules to the public Marketplace preview.

users.name: Jonas Lehmann
users.notes: Authored 14 custom rules — bank-specific compliance patterns. Mentor to other Northwall rule-authors.

users.name: Indira Banerjee
users.notes: Filed an issue (Northwall internal: NW-1247) about the Marketplace browse UI feeling sparse on her first visit; provided sketch suggestions, some shipped in PYL-204.

users.name: Tobias Akkerman
users.notes: Java-heavy work. Workaround user — runs SonarQube alongside Pylon for Java coverage; will switch fully when Pylon Java preview ships Q3.

users.name: Renata Cabral
users.notes: Same first name as Pylon's VP CS (emp_030); referenced once in a Slack joke during the Q4 QBR.

users.name: Solange Mahler
users.notes: Contributed an open-source Beacon rule before signing. Knows the codebase well; high signal-to-noise feedback.

users.name: Ife Adesanya
users.notes: Heavy async-correctness needs. Likely an early subscriber to the PYL-104 async rule pack once it's GA.

users.name: Boris Cardoso
users.notes: Just past 60-day mark. Onboarded smoothly; quoted in Pylon's onboarding research as 'first PR review felt like having a senior engineer next to me.'
